description:
Cross-platform SSHpass - SSH with password authentication from the command line

A cross-platform implementation of sshpass (Windows & Linux), providing password or private key authentication for SSH, SFTP file transfer with progress bar, SCP/rsync-style file transfer, interactive shell with raw terminal mode, proxy tunneling (SOCKS4/5, HTTP/HTTPS), breakpoint-resume, file hash/verify, and config file support.
